name: ISB Corporation
summary: ISB Corporation provides software development services for mobile, medical, and in-vehicle applications in Japan. It offers cloud infrastructure construction, operation design, and operation maintenance; system operation services; and verification of mobile devices, as well as data center services, including housing and hosting. The company also develops and sells business products, such as packaging; sells equipment associated with system; and manufactures, maintains, and sells exit control systems, electric locks, ten keys, etc. It develops software for core system construction for use in the government, finance, communication, and transportation sectors. ISB Corporation was founded in 1970 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
